commit_scope: Record the investment-ux production deploy attempt, improve cc deploy help/error reporting, and capture the sandbox blocker that prevented SSH and health verification.

commands: git commit -m "impl(investment-ux): record blocked deploy attempt"
local_validation.summary: Verified the patched deploy command prints usage instead of attempting a deployment when called with --help, but the required git stage/commit sequence was blocked because the sandbox cannot create the worktree index.lock file.

ci_validation.summary: No CI run was started from this sandboxed worktree.

commands: ssh -i ~/.ssh/hostinger-openclaw -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@187.77.152.42 'echo connected && hostname && cd /docker/coherence-network/repo && git rev-parse --short HEAD'
deploy_validation.summary: Production deploy could not be executed from this environment because SSH to the VPS was blocked with 'Operation not permitted' and the production health host could not be resolved.

phase_gate.reason: Production deploy proof is blocked by sandbox network restrictions, and the required local git commit is blocked by sandbox filesystem restrictions, so this task cannot be truthfully marked as deployed.
